description: Wireformat capture for baidu (ERNIE) and gamma. For each service, send a simple prompt and capture the COMPLETE raw SSE/streaming response from DevTools Network tab. We need the exact wire protocol to build v2 templates (same approach that worked for DeepSeek #459 and HuggingFace #459).

steps: Open DevTools Network tab, enable Preserve log
Type simple prompt: '빛의 속도는?' and submit
Wait for full response to complete
Find the SSE response in Network tab (should be yiyan.baidu.com/eb/chat/conversation/v2)
Click on the request, go to Response tab
COPY THE COMPLETE RAW RESPONSE BODY — every line, every field, every event boundary
Also note: Content-Type header from Response Headers
Also note: any other SSE events before/after the main content (like status events, done events)
Report the FULL wireformat including all SSE event types, field names, data structure
Check if there is an AI chat feature (gamma is an AI presentation tool)
If chat/generation available, open DevTools Network tab
Type a simple generation prompt and submit
Find the streaming/SSE response in Network tab
COPY THE COMPLETE RAW RESPONSE BODY
Note: Content-Type, response format (SSE/NDJSON/JSON), all field names

critical_note: We need the EXACT raw bytes/text of the successful response, not a summary. Include ALL SSE events (data:, event:, id: lines), ALL JSON fields, ALL status/metadata events. This is for building byte-accurate v2 templates.
